'''vanuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khatauni|khatauni]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khatauni|khatauni]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vanuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vænichith|vænichith]] || [[word:vænichij|vænichij]] || [[word:vænichish|vænichish]] || [[word:vænichi|vænichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanunuchuth|vanunuchuth]] || [[word:vanunuchuj|vanunuchuj]] || [[word:vanunuchush|vanunuchush]] || [[word:vanunuchu|vanunuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanuchuth|vanuchuth]] || [[word:vanuchuj|vanuchuj]] || [[word:vanuchush|vanuchush]] || [[word:vanuchu|vanuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanufchuth|vanufchuth]] || [[word:vanufchuj|vanufchuj]] || [[word:vanufchush|vanufchush]] || [[word:vanufchuf|vanufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanuchuthu|vanuchuthu]] || [[word:vanuchuju|vanuchuju]] || [[word:vanuchushu|vanuchushu]] || [[word:vanuchuku|vanuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanuchuth|vanuchuth]] || [[word:vanuchuj|vanuchuj]] || [[word:vanuchush|vanuchush]] || [[word:vanuchu|vanuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanuchuthul|vanuchuthul]] || [[word:vanuchujul|vanuchujul]] || [[word:vanuchushul|vanuchushul]] || [[word:vanuchukul|vanuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanuchuthuthu|vanuchuthuthu]] || [[word:vanuchujuju|vanuchujuju]] || [[word:vanuchushushu|vanuchushushu]] || [[word:vanuchuku|vanuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanuchuthun|vanuchuthun]] || [[word:vanuchujun|vanuchujun]] || [[word:vanuchushun|vanuchushun]] || [[word:vanuchukun|vanuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanuchuthuoro|vanuchuthuoro]] || [[word:vanuchujuoro|vanuchujuoro]] || [[word:vanuchushuoro|vanuchushuoro]] || [[word:vanuchukuoro|vanuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
